Serie A: Bologna vs. Roma: Probable line-ups and where to watch
arts.sum: Both Bologna and Roma have fit and healthy squads and plenty of competition for places...

Bologna have won their last three league matches against Roma with an overall score of 8-3; the Rossoblù have not achieved four consecutive victories against the Giallorossi in Serie A since the period between October 1958 and January 1961 (5). For the third time in a row Bologna faces Roma finding themselves above the Giallorossi in the Serie A standings at the start of the matchday; this had only happened once in the 21 previous meetings between the two teams in the competition.
